subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! The slackness in dispatching letters has become a source of shame for this servant; yet the Lord Almighty is witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان فتور در ارسال رسائل سبب خجلت اینعبد گشته ولی حضرت کبریا شاهد و
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
